title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Cascade RCNN
steps.summary: Cascade RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with PV-RCNN and Mask RCNN. It opens into Cascade-Mask-RCNN-Swin.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Core Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Grid RCNN
steps.summary: Grid RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with Grid RCNN-V2 and PV-RCNN. It opens into Grid RCNN-V2.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Core Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Grid RCNN-V2
steps.summary: Grid RCNN-V2 belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after Grid RCNN.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Core Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Libra RCNN
steps.summary: Libra RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with Libra RCNN-X101 and PV-RCNN. It opens into Libra RCNN-X101.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Core Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Libra RCNN-X101
steps.summary: Libra RCNN-X101 belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after Libra RCNN.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Core Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Mask RCNN
steps.summary: Mask RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with PV-RCNN and Libra RCNN. It opens into Cascade-Mask-RCNN-Swin.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Core Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: PV-RCNN
steps.summary: PV-RCNN belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Compare it with PV-RCNN++ and Mask RCNN. It opens into PV-RCNN++.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Core Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: PV-RCNN++
steps.summary: PV-RCNN++ belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Core Models. Start after PV-RCNN and R(2+1)D.
